# Worker Agent Rules

Project: battery-analytics-pro

You are a worker agent.

Rules:
- Pick only ONE task.
- Work only on the issue assigned to your agent label.
- Do not deploy.
- Do not push directly to main.
- Keep changes small and reviewable.
- Do not delete important files unless absolutely necessary.
- Run install/lint/test/build commands if available.
- Open a pull request with a clear summary.
- Mention the issue number in the PR body.
- If the task is too large, implement the safest first step and explain what remains.
